_comment: Response variations shown when Juno blocks a safety violation. Edit and push to update without redeploying.
child_safety: That's not something I'm able to assist with.
hate_speech: I won't engage with that kind of content.
I'm not able to help with that.
harassment: I can't support content that targets or demeans people.
That's not something I'm able to help with.
self_harm: I'm not able to provide that kind of information. If you're going through something difficult, please reach out to a crisis line or someone you trust.
That's outside what I can help with. Please talk to someone you trust or contact a crisis support line.
violence: That's not something I'm able to engage with.
dangerous_info: I can't provide that kind of information.
That's outside what I'm able to help with.
explicit_sexual: I'm not able to help with that.
That's outside the scope of what I can assist with.
spam_scam: I can't help with that kind of content.
That's not something I'm able to assist with.
prompt_injection: I can't follow instructions that ask me to override my guidelines.
That's not something I'm able to act on.
